summary: Russian operators of the "Rubicon" Center conducted combat operations on April 16-17, 2026, destroying 105 Ukrainian personnel and UAVs across the Donbas, Krasny Liman, Belgorod, and Sumy directions, while also remotely mining Ukrainian logistics routes and cooperating with Russian Aerospace Forces to target UAV launch points. Ukrainian forces employed aerial relay drones to extend FPV strike ranges beyond electronic warfare interference, and used drone detectors to survive Russian FPV attacks near Kostiantinivka. In one engagement, Russian FPV drones killed two soldiers assaulting Ukrainian positions on motorcycles, and another Russian soldier attempting to feign surrender was later killed by FPVs. Additionally, a Russian air defense drone "Yolka" intercepted a Ukrainian "Shark-M" UAV, triggering its parachute system and allowing capture by the 16th Special Purpose Brigade near Krasny Liman.
